message:
fix: suppress biome a11y false positives in Dashboards and Fleet pages

Add biome-ignore lint/a11y/useSemanticElements comments to interactive
div elements in Dashboards.tsx (card, modal overlay) and Fleet.tsx
(table rows) where semantic HTML alternatives are not viable due to
nested button controls and complex table layouts. Fix import ordering
in Dashboards.tsx. Track new auth hardening and cleanup bugs in beads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
